name: Kimi K2
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, 384 experts (8 active + 1 shared/token), 61 layers, MLA attention
note: 1T-parameter MoE agentic model trained with the MuonClip optimizer; open-sourced under a modified MIT license.
tpsNote: Does not fit on a single RTX 4090 (24GB); practical Q4 quants need ~250-600GB combined RAM/VRAM, with heavy CPU/SSD offload reported at only ~5-10 tok/s

results.notes: MATH-500 [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model. GitHub README (moonshotai/Kimi-K2, mirrors HF card) verified 1T total/32B active/384 experts/128K ctx/Modified MIT License and all 5 benchmark scores (LiveCodeBench 53.7, AIME24 69.6, MMLU 89.5, SWE-bench 65.8, MATH-500 97.4) verbatim. Exact release date July 11, 2025 confirmed via multiple sources (model's own '0711' version tag, Global Times, Wikipedia). Pricing $0.57/$2.30 per M tokens confirmed via OpenRouter/pricepertoken listings for 'Kimi K2 0711'. HF page itself was rate-limited (429) during this session but GitHub README mirror gave identical figures.
